quote: The secret to doing great research is to work on problems you can't stop thinking about.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Every model is wrong, but some are useful enough to change the world.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Data beats intuition, but intuition tells you which data to collect.
author: Axon Sample

quote: The best experiment is the one you can run before lunch.
author: Axon Sample

quote: A curious mind with simple tools outperforms an idle mind with powerful ones.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Overfitting is what happens when a model memorizes instead of learns.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Small models trained on the right data often beat large models trained on the wrong data.
author: Axon Sample

quote: The goal of machine learning is generalization, not memorization.
author: Axon Sample

quote: If you can't explain your model's mistake, you don't understand your model.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Reproducibility is the difference between science and anecdote.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Start with a baseline so simple it embarrasses you.
author: Axon Sample

quote: The loss curve tells a story; learn to read it.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Feature engineering is the art of telling the model where to look.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Evaluation is a design decision, not an afterthought.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Great research tools disappear; only the ideas remain visible.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Regularization is the humility of a model.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Your test set is a promise to your future self.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Iterate quickly, measure honestly, publish bravely.
author: Axon Sample

quote: An accessible tool multiplies the number of minds on a problem.
author: Axon Sample

quote: Science advances when experiments become cheaper.
author: Axon Sample
